message:
feat(openai): add embeddings, images, audio, fine-tuning, and assistants operations

Expand the OpenAI connector from chat-completion-only to comprehensive
API coverage:

- Embeddings: text-embedding-3-small/large, ada-002 with cost tracking
- Image generation: DALL-E 2/3 with size/quality/style params
- Audio transcription: Whisper via multipart upload
- Text-to-speech: TTS-1, TTS-1-HD with voice/format/speed options
- Fine-tuning: create, list, get, cancel, events CRUD
- Assistants API: create, list, threads, messages, runs

All operations include full manifest schemas, typed Rust structs, client
methods, connector handlers, and deterministic wiremock integration tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
